utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Ok , I am making a break for it , I am going out the window .

emotion_cause.span: 3_You set me up with the woman that I have dumped twice in the last five months !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No , no , no , do not ! I have been waiting for like , forever to go out with Lorraine . Just calm down .

emotion_cause.span: 1_I am making a break for it , I am going out the window .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Calm down ? Calm down ? You set me up with the woman that I have dumped twice in the last five months !

emotion_cause.span: 3_You set me up with the woman that I have dumped twice in the last five months

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Can you stop yelling ? You are making me nervous , and I can not go when I am nervous .

emotion_cause.span: 4_Can you stop yelling ? You are making me nervous , and I can not go when I am nervous .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I am sorry , I am sorry , you are right . Come on , do it , do it , go , come on ! ! !

emotion_cause.span: 4_Can you stop yelling ? You are making me nervous , and I can not go when I am nervous .
